strings.DebugLog.Title: Debug Log
strings.Dialog.FfmpegBrowse.Title: Select ffmpeg.exe
strings.Dialog.FrameSave.Title: Save Current Frame
strings.Dialog.OpenVideo.Title: Open Video
strings.FfmpegMissing.Description: OctoCut requires FFmpeg to run. ffmpeg.exe was not found in the current settings or PATH. Install it with WinGet, or select an existing ffmpeg.exe path manually. If you cancel, OctoCut will close.
strings.FfmpegMissing.Title: FFmpeg Required
strings.FfmpegMissing.WingetUnavailable.ToolTip: winget.exe was not found on this PC. Microsoft App Installer is required.
strings.Log.Delete.Ripple: Ripple deleted {0}. Later clips were pulled forward with no gap.
strings.Log.Ffmpeg.NotFoundAfterInstall: FFmpeg was still not found after installation.
strings.Log.Frame.ClipboardFailed: Failed to copy the current frame to the clipboard.
strings.Log.Frame.CopiedToClipboard: Copied the current frame to the clipboard. Frame {0}
strings.Log.Frame.SaveFailed: Failed to save the current frame file.
strings.Log.Frame.SavedToFile: Saved the current frame to file: {0}
strings.Log.Preview.Failed: Could not generate thumbnails or waveform preview.
strings.Log.Preview.Generating: Generating timeline thumbnails and audio waveform...
strings.Log.Ripple.Off: Ripple delete off: only the selected clip will be removed.
strings.Log.Ripple.On: Ripple delete on: gaps created by deletion are closed by pulling later clips forward.
strings.Log.Split.Boundary: Cannot split on a clip boundary.
strings.Log.Split.TooShort: This split position would make a clip too short.
strings.Log.Video.DurationFailed: Could not read the video duration.
strings.Main.Button.RippleDelete.ToolTip: Ripple delete: closes the gap by pulling later clips forward.
strings.Main.Menu.RenderCopy.ToolTip: When possible, render with FFmpeg stream copy without re-encoding.
strings.Main.Menu.RenderEncode.ToolTip: Encode a new file as H.264/AAC.
strings.Message.FfmpegCheckRequired.Title: FFmpeg Check Required
strings.Message.FfmpegNotFoundAfterInstall: Installation finished, but ffmpeg.exe was not found by the app. OctoCut will close.
strings.Message.InvalidExecutable: The selected file cannot be used.
strings.Message.OutputSameAsInput: The output file must be different from the source video path.
strings.Message.RenderCopyUnavailable: Stream copy render is not available for the current video format or clip state. Use encoded render instead.
strings.Message.WingetFailed.Title: winget Installation Failed
strings.Message.WingetMissing: winget.exe was not found. Install Microsoft App Installer or set the FFmpeg path manually.
strings.Message.WingetMissing.Title: WinGet Not Found
strings.Render.Progress.NoClips: There are no clips to render.
strings.Settings.FfmpegHint: Leave empty to automatically find ffmpeg.exe from PATH.
strings.Settings.Title: Settings
strings.Timeline.Empty: Open a video to show the edit timeline.
strings.Shortcuts.Space: Start playback here; press again to return to start position and stop
strings.Shortcuts.Title: Shortcuts
